build.preInstall: echo "export const SUPABASE_CONFIG = { ASSETS_URL: '$EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ASSETS_URL', CAMPAIGN_MATERIALS_URL: '$EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_CAMPAIGN_URL' }; export const SUPABASE_URL = '$EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL'; export const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY = '$EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY'; export const LOCAL_CONFIG = { BASE_URL_IP: '$EXPO_PUBLIC_BASE_URL_IP', BASE_URL_IP_API: '$EXPO_PUBLIC_BASE_URL_IP_API' }; export const CURRENT_SESSION = { userName: '' };" > src/config.ts
